  SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT-0

  File:          stantext.ads (Ada Package Specification)
  Language:      Ada (1995) [1]
  Author:        Lev Kujawski
  Description:   Type-safe printf() emulation for string localization

  References:
  [1] Information technology - Programming languages - Ada,
      ISO/IEC 8652:1995(E), 15 Feb. 1995.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

  Standard_Text utilizes the C library's printf family of functions to
  guarantee that output will match that of C programs using the standard
  library.

subprograms.code:
function "&" (Left  : in Text_T;
              Right : in Character) return Text_T

function "&" (Left  : in Text_T;
              Right : in Integer) return Text_T

function "&" (Left  : in Text_T;
              Right : in Long_Long_Float) return Text_T

function "&" (Left  : in Text_T;
              Right : in String) return Text_T

function "&" (Left  : in Text_T;
              Right : in Element_T) return Text_T

function "&" (Left  : in Text_T;
              Right : in Modifier_T) return Text_T

function "&" (Left  : in Text_T;
              Right : in System.Address) return Text_T

subprograms.name: Float_L
subprograms.code: function Float_L (Value : in Long_Float) return Element_T

subprograms.name: Format_Of
subprograms.code: function Format_Of (The_Text : in Text_T) return String

subprograms.name: Integer_L
subprograms.code: function Integer_L (Value : in Long_Integer) return Element_T

subprograms.name: Message
New_Line
subprograms.code: function New_Line return String

subprograms.name: No_Positive_Sign
subprograms.code: function No_Positive_Sign return Modifier_T

subprograms.name: No_Thousands_Grouping

subprograms.name: Positive_Sign
subprograms.code: function Positive_Sign return Modifier_T

subprograms.name: Precision
subprograms.code: function Precision (Number_of_Digits : in Natural) return Modifier_T

subprograms.name: Raw
subprograms.code: function Raw (From_String : in String) return Element_T

subprograms.name: String_Of
subprograms.code: function String_Of (The_Text : in Text_T) return String

subprograms.name: Text
subprograms.code: function Text return Text_T

subprograms.name: Thousands_Grouping
subprograms.code: function Thousands_Grouping return Modifier_T
